title: 30W UV Mosquito Killer - Industrial 4000V Electric Fly Zapper with All-Metal Body for Superior Indoor & Outdoor Insect Control (UK Plug)
bullet_points: [Upgraded High-Voltage Grid] Equipped with an upgraded 4000V electric grid that delivers a near-instantaneous zap—eliminating over 95% of contacted flying insects in a single strike. The high-voltage design ensures reliable, one-hit kills on mosquitoes, flies, moths, and more, minimizing escape and maximizing daily protection.
[Upgraded UV Lamps] Upgraded 30W UV lamps (365–395nm) deliver stronger attraction and wider coverage—effective in spaces up to 200m², perfect for spacious homes or light commercial use.

[Easy to Clean] Designed for hassle-free maintenance with a fully removable, non-spill insect collection tray. Simply unplug the unit, slide out the tray, empty or rinse it under the tap, and slide it back in.

[2-in-1 Placement] Use it freestanding on countertops, shelves, dining tables or sideboards—or hang it from walls, ceilings or hooks using the included metal chain. Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, home offices, conservatories, greenhouses, and even small cafés or B&Bs—wherever you need reliable, out-of-the-way pest control.

[Prevents Accidental Touch] Fully enclosed with a tightly woven, fine-mesh safety guard that completely surrounds the high-voltage grid, making it impossible for fingers—especially children’s—or curious pets to reach the electrified components. You get powerful pest control without compromising on household safety, even during overnight or unsupervised use.
[Quick fix] In rare cases, bulbs can shift during shipping. Just rotate them firmly into place and plug in.
